subject: small-statured figure with pointed ears in academic hat and embroidered dark coat, holding an open book, FFXIV Scholar job class
description: A small-statured figure with clearly visible pointed ears stands in a three-quarter pose, consistent with the Lalafell or similar small race from FFXIV. The figure wears a large elaborate academic hat adorned with a white feather and intricate embroidery, paired with a dark formal coat decorated with ornate stitching. Glasses are worn. The figure holds an open book in one hand and appears to hold a small stylus or instrument in the other. The background is a pale blue-white gradient.
